gaps: fedcourts query cannot filter by case name / party, which is the only usable similarity key for sparse historical dockets; I fell back to read-only SQL on corpus.db to find other 'v. Wainwright' Misc-docket priors
comparable historical priors in the corpus have no disposition labels and no opinion_text, so similar-prior retrieval yielded profile context but no realized outcomes
a snapshot-provided filing date or Term would materially change the probability here (Gideon-era GVR wave vs. ordinary denial)
helpful: fedcourts stats --court scotus for the resolved-disposition base rate
corpus events table for locating comparable v. Wainwright Misc-docket petitions
notes: Snapshot had no docket entries, dates, or lower-court info; prediction rests on docket-number format (pre-1971 miscellaneous docket), respondent identity, and cert-stage base rates.
